name: Progress Bar

representativeVariants.desc: 8-segment bar showing storage breakdown, S3 result area height 32px (Direction B data visualization hero)
Compact bar with HD icon + percentage, S1 config state, height 16px (Direction B more prominent)
2-column grid of color dot + label + GB value

segmented.segments: 8 flex items with flex-basis percentage, min-width 2px
segmented.legend: grid 2-col, gap 6px 16px, 8px dot + label + mono GB value

structurePatterns: Segmented: remaining segment is transparent (base color shows through), not colored green
Segmented: each segment has title attribute for tooltip (e.g. title="系统 75GB")
Mini: layout is [icon 20px][bar flex:1][percentage text], non-sticky
Legend: dots are 8px round, labels are 0.75rem secondary, values are 0.75rem mono tertiary
usageHints: Segmented bar: S3 result card only, height 32px desktop (--size-progress-bar-result, Direction B) / 20px mobile
Mini bar: S1 config state only, height 16px (--size-progress-bar-mini, Direction B), positioned before scenario/config module
Remaining segment: always transparent, per Apple/Windows storage visualization convention
Progress bar fill color follows status: critical=red, manageable=amber, comfortable=blue, abundant=green
In high-fidelity: segmented bar height may increase to 24-32px (Direction B data visualization weight)
doNotInvent: No animated progress bar fills (deferred to high-fidelity decision)
